# Handover Continuation — 2026-06-25

*Auto-generated by TCTBP handover on 2026-06-25 03:15:02*

## Session Summary

Ported 3 enhancements from the media-seeker scaffolded project back to TCTBP-Web: (1) `--note-file` flag and `buildAutoSummary()` function in handover runner so agents can pass session narratives through a temp file instead of shell-escaping markdown; (2) `pruneContinuationFiles()` to auto-clean old `.tctbp/continuation/` files keeping the N most recent; (3) auto-generated vs Copilot-written detection in orient runner so the welcome-back messages differentiate between full narrative context and bare git-stat dumps. Also updated `TCTBP Agent.md` handover note section from "Mandatory" to "Automatic" with the new `--note-file` procedure and added `maxContinuationFiles: 5` to `TCTBP.json`.

Gotchas: all 5 core libs and 19 other runners were byte-identical between repos — only handover and orient had diverged. The media-seeker `TCTBP.json` is a scaffolded subset, not a superset, so no schema keys to port beyond `maxContinuationFiles`.

Next: continue media-seeker application development.
